title: Hidden Armor Modded
description: This resourcepack makes armor turn invisible for Minecraft and other mods too!
body:
**Description:** Do you want to see your awesome skin and everyone else's? Well, this resource pack is just for you. The point of this pack is to make armor from different mods invisible. Not only, but this also applies to vanilla armor. **Mod Compatibility:**
Spoiler - Better Nether - Better End - Adventurez - Environmentz - The Twilight Forest - Paradise Lost - Create - The Aether - The Midnight - Alex's Mobs - Ad Astra - Advanced Netherite - Immersive Armors - Wizards (RPG Series) - L Ender's Cataclysm
Want to install it on bedrock? Head over to Planet Minecraft! - [Click on me](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/hidden-armor-for-various-mods/)
